arts.ttl: Klopp smiles broadly as Leipzig defeats Werder Bremen 4-2 in Bundesliga
arts.sum: The family’s takeover of the second-tier club includes bringing Red Bull on board as a minority stakeholder. Both Xavi and Šeško fit the profile of highly talented young players that Klopp will be expected to develop and attract to the growing Red Bull stable of clubs.

Werder, who had won their last three league games before the winter break, levelled two minutes later through Mitchell Weiser but Xavi bagged his second goal of the afternoon with a superb solo effort and a slightly deflected effort that went in off the crossbar. RB Leipzig's Xavi Simons scored twice on his comeback from injury to help his team to a 4-2 victory over visitors Werder Bremen on Sunday as new Red Bull Head of global soccer Juergen Klopp watched from the stands.

arts.ttl: Xavi Simons brace sees Leipzig beat Werder Bremen
arts.sum: Xavi Simons' return marked a huge victory for RB Leipzig in their first game of 2025 over in-form Werder Bremen as he marked his return with a brace.

arts.ttl: Sunday's Bundesliga predictions including RB Leipzig vs. Werder Bremen
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Bundesliga fixtures, including RB Leipzig vs. Werder Bremen.

arts.ttl: RB Leipzig vs Werder Bremen preview: Leipzig look to bounce back after break
arts.sum: RB Leipzig manager Marco Rose will aim to put speculation about his possible dismissal in 2024 firmly in the rearview mirror as he seeks to kick off 2025 with a Bundesliga victory against Werder Bremen at home on Sunday at Red Bull Arena.

arts.ttl: Preview: RB Leipzig vs. Werder Bremen - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's Bundesliga clash between RB Leipzig and Werder Bremen, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Leipzig signs wing back Ridle Baku from Bundesliga rival Wolfsburg
arts.sum: Leipzig has signed wing back Ridle Baku from Bundesliga rival Wolfsburg after an injury to Benjamin Henrichs. Leipzig said Friday that the 26-year-old Baku had signed a 2½-year contract to 2027.

arts.ttl: Official | Ridle Baku joins RB Leipzig from Wolfsburg for €4.5m
arts.sum: RB Leipzig have announced that they have completed their first signing of the winter window as Ridle Baku joins from Wolfsburg. Baku’s contract in the Autostadt expired at the end…

arts.ttl: Leipzig officially unveil Baku: "Excellent conditions for successful football."
arts.sum: Ridle Baku's move to RB Leipzig has been officially confirmed.
